args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-13950065094603633265']
ratings = locals()['var_function-call-2831307509239074059']

# Convert to DataFrames
df_biz = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_ratings = pd.DataFrame(ratings)

# Calculate average rating
avg_ratings = df_ratings.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
avg_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'avg_rating'}, inplace=True)

# Merge
merged = pd.merge(df_biz, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
result = merged.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(result[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_json(orient='records'))

import json

ratings = locals()['var_function-call-2831307509239074059']

df_ratings = pd.DataFrame(ratings)

avg_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'avg_rating'}, inplace=True)

# Merge
merged = pd.merge(df_biz, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
result = merged.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(result[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_json(orient='records'))
